data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Simplifies the user interface to improve decision-making speed.
data.technical_spec: Limits choices per page to streamline the user journey.

data.title: Fitt’s Law
data.description: Designs targets strategically to enhance user interaction efficiency.
data.technical_spec: Increases clickable area for primary actions, reducing user error.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Design principle that emphasizes chunking information for better retention.
data.technical_spec: Groups similar features together to improve information processing.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Associates aesthetically pleasing designs with improved usability perceptions.
data.technical_spec: Employs minimalist design elements with coherent color schemes.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Ensures related elements are grouped together for intuitive understanding.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes grid-based layouts to maintain logical grouping.
